consensus_notes: CONSENSUS: state.json teardown and swarm-state.json initial writes are non-atomic (3 of 5 workers flagged independently)
CONSENSUS: monitor only reads swarm-state.json, not child-agents.jsonl; proof file not directly verified
CONSENSUS: incomplete-proof warning only fires on status==success, not partial
CONSENSUS: 50 squads / 0 workers generates no warning — workers check requires truthy workers_launched
UNIQUE (wkr-017-001): task_id=None at init conflicts with spec requirement to record task_id after claiming
UNIQUE (wkr-017-005): launcher prompt missing claimed-task-file cleanup instruction
key_gaps: Non-atomic writes: swarm-state.json init (stampede.sh:832), fleet.json (stampede.sh:844), state.json teardown (stampede.sh:355)
Monitor warning blind spot: launch_proof_required defaults False; workers=0/squads=50 passes silently
Cleanup gap: commander not instructed to remove claimed task file after bundle write
task_id=None at init; must be updated after claiming — spec says 'record the claimed task_id'
